description_blurb:
This document is email correspondence describing the content of a mission report and requesting clarification on its content.
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D50, Email Correspondence, INDOPACOM, April 2025
summary: This document is email correspondence describing the content of a mission report and requesting clarification on its content. The emails confirm the unclassified nature of 'tearlines' detailing UAP observations by US aircraft on April 10 and 11, 2025, within the INDOPACOM AOR. The observations involved a single UAP flying at unknown altitude and speed, with no noted interference.
reported_behavior: Flying at unknown altitude and unknown speed, no interference was noted.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document provides extremely minimal information about the observed object. The descriptions 'UNK ALTITUDE AND UNK SPEED' and 'NO INTERFERENCE WAS NOTED' offer no anomalous characteristics or features that resist a mundane explanation. The sightings were brief (12 and 23 seconds), and only a single sensor (visual) is implied. The term 'POSS UAP' simply means 'possibly unidentified,' not 'anomalous,' and the lack of any descriptive details makes it impossible to rule out common prosaic explanations.
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-D50, Email Correspondence, INDOPACOM, April 2025 - Page 1

(b)(6)

I just got off the phone with the unit that flies [1.4(a)] They said to me that the two lines listed are on the UNCLASSIFIED level and that adding in the AOR as INDOPACOM is also at the UNCLASSIFIED level.

(b)(6)
PAROC Intel Data Analysis Technician
Team Lead
12 AF / DET 3
(b)(6)

[redacted]

CLASSIFICATION: ~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

Hello,

Per our conversation, can you please confirm that the [1.4(a)] tearlines below are at the UNCLASSIFIED level? Also, could you please confirm that we can use the AOR INDOPACOM.

Thank you,
(b)(6)

1



# DOW-UAP-D50, Email Correspondence, INDOPACOM, April 2025 - Page 2

[redacted]
(b) (6)

CLASSIFICATION: ~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

[redacted]
(b) (6)

CLASSIFICATION: ~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

Hello,

I wanted to clarify that these tearlines are approved at the UNCLASSIFIED level.

1.4(a) on 10APR25
//UNCLASSIFIED//
US AIRCRAFT OBSERVED 1X POSS UAP FOR 12 SECONDS AT 2353Z, FLYING AT UNK ALTITUDE AND UNK SPEED, NO INTERFERENCE WAS NOTED.
//UNCLASSIFIED//

1.4(a) on 11APR25
//UNCLASSIFIED//
US AIRCRAFT OBSERVED 1X POSS UAP FOR 23 SECONDS AT 0007Z, FLYING AT UNK ALTITUDE AND UNK SPEED, NO INTERFERENCE WAS NOTED.
//UNCLASSIFIED//

Thank you,

[redacted]
(b) (6)
Information Disclosure Analyst
Office of the Undersecretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security
[redacted]
(b) (6)

2
cover_up_reasoning: The document is an email exchange explicitly discussing the declassification of UAP sighting summaries to an UNCLASSIFIED level. While the emails themselves are marked 'SECRET//NOFORN' and contain standard (b)(6) redactions for personal identifiers, this reflects the administrative process of handling classified information rather than an attempt to conceal the UAP event details. The outcome of the correspondence is the confirmation that the UAP tearlines are UNCLASSIFIED, indicating a move towards disclosure rather than suppression.
summary_zh: 本文件为电子邮件通信，描述了一份任务报告的内容并请求对其内容进行澄清。这些电子邮件确认了2025年4月10日和11日美国飞机在INDOPACOM责任区内观测到UAP的“tearlines”（摘要）为非密性质。观测涉及一个单一的UAP，以未知高度和未知速度飞行，未发现任何干扰。
reported_behavior_zh: 以未知高度和未知速度飞行，未发现任何干扰。
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥得分较高，原因在于该文件对所观测物体提供的信息极少。“未知高度和未知速度”以及“未发现干扰”的描述未能提供任何异常特征或特性，无法排除世俗解释。观测时间短暂（12秒和23秒），且仅暗示使用单一传感器（目视）。“POSS UAP”一词仅指“可能未识别”，而非“异常”，且缺乏任何描述性细节，使得无法排除常见的平淡解释。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件是一份电子邮件往来，明确讨论将UAP目击摘要解密至非密级别。尽管这些电子邮件本身被标记为“SECRET//NOFORN”并包含用于个人身份信息的标准(b)(6)密文删除，但这反映了处理机密信息的行政程序，而非试图隐瞒UAP事件细节。通信结果是确认UAP摘要为非密，表明倾向于披露而非压制。
claims: US aircraft observed 1x poss UAP for 12 seconds at 2353Z on 10APR25
US aircraft observed 1x poss UAP for 23 seconds at 0007Z on 11APR25
UAP flying at unknown altitude and unknown speed
claims_zh: 美国飞机于2025年4月10日2353Z观测到1个可能是UAP的物体，持续12秒
美国飞机于2025年4月11日0007Z观测到1个可能是UAP的物体，持续23秒
UAP以未知高度和未知速度飞行
bust_explanations: Distant aircraft or other conventional aerial object: The report provides no specific details on the object's appearance, shape, or light signature. The 'unknown altitude and unknown speed' description allows for a wide range of conventional aircraft, especially when observed briefly (12 and 23 seconds) from another aircraft.

High-altitude balloon or weather balloon: Given the unknown altitude and speed, a balloon could easily be mistaken for an unidentified object, particularly if observed against a featureless sky or at a distance where its characteristics are obscured.

Misidentified astronomical object: Brief visual sightings of bright stars, planets, or satellites can occur, especially if the observer is unfamiliar with their appearance or movement relative to their own aircraft.
bust_explanations_zh: 远距离飞机或其他常规空中物体：报告未提供关于该物体外观、形状或光信号的任何具体细节。“未知高度和未知速度”的描述允许其为多种常规飞机，尤其是在从另一架飞机上短暂观测（12秒和23秒）时。
高空气球或气象气球：鉴于未知的高度和速度，气球很容易被误认为不明物体，尤其是在无特征的天空背景下或在距离较远导致其特征模糊时。
误认的天文物体：短暂的目视观测到亮星、行星或卫星的情况可能发生，尤其是在观测者不熟悉它们相对于自身飞机的外观或移动时。
cover_up_indicators: Email chain initially marked SECRET//NOFORN, despite confirming content as UNCLASSIFIED
cover_up_indicators_zh: 用于个人身份信息的标准(b)(6)密文删除
电子邮件链最初标记为“SECRET//NOFORN”，尽管其内容被确认为非密
